assignment.title: Body Fluid Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
Body fluid evidence is one of the most common pieces of evidence that can be found at a crime scene, especially when a violent crime has occurred.  This evidence can be extremely useful in helping investigators piece together the events of a crime.  In this assignment you will demonstrate your understanding of body fluid evidence.

Complete the following assignment about body fluid evidence. Click on the image below to make a copy of the Body Fluid Evidence Assignment.  Remember to double click on the header to open it and add your name to the document.

When you have completed the assignment, upload it below and select Submit to complete your submission.

Revisit the Course Information section if you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments.
